product_results.title: 2021 Apple MacBook Pro (16-inch, Apple M1 Pro chip with 10‑core CPU and 16‑core GPU, 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD) - Space Grey - French

summary.text: The notebook computer delivers solid performance and is described as an extremely capable machine. Customers find the battery life impressive with a more robust battery. The screen and display receive praise for being amazing with excellent display hue. The speakers are fantastic and the camera and speakers are also good. However, some customers report durability issues, with one unit breaking in 3 days and shutting down a few seconds later.

authors_reviews.title: Très bon ordinateur
authors_reviews.text: Magnifique écran, ordinateur très rapide et silencieux. Cher mais ça vaut le prix. La garantie n'était pas activée initiallement, mais facilement reglé avec Apple, donc aucun problème!
authors_reviews.author: anton

authors_reviews.title: Flagship Laptop
authors_reviews.text: I chose this laptop over the M2 pro 16 as its SSD spend is twice as fast, is just as fast as the m2 in the real world for most things but stays cool when really pushed unlike the m2 and has a better sound. Even though I got this at a lower cost, I still would chose it over the m2 pro 16.
authors_reviews.author: JP Edmonton AB

authors_reviews.title: Issue macbook
authors_reviews.text: I think there's a problem with this Mac: if I move it, it makes a noise like something is detached inside. It's the same issue that was reported by a customer on Amazon on February 17, 2024. There's a video that was uploaded by the customer.
authors_reviews.author: Byron Mcdonnell
